name: Perspective
when_to_use: 需要在浏览器本地对大表做交互式分组、拆列、聚合、筛选并在数据网格与图形插件间切换时用它,而非手写透视引擎——原生在 WASM 列式计算和持续重算上失败;非做静态摘要表或服务端数据仓库。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到百万行级本地列式透视、流式增量计算与可序列化分析视图;手写 JavaScript 聚合在规模、类型稳定性和交互重算三处均为 0% 区。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need local in-browser interactive grouping, column splitting, aggregation, and filtering of large tables, with switching between a data grid and visualization plugins, instead of hand-writing a pivot engine. Native implementations fail on WASM columnar computation and continuous recomputation. It is not for static summary tables or server-side data warehouses.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot provide local million-row columnar pivots, streaming incremental computation, or serializable analytic views by default. Hand-written JavaScript aggregation fails on scale, type stability, and interactive recomputation.

data_in.note: table is first passed to @finos/perspective worker.table, then the returned Table is passed to perspective-viewer.load. An empty state must use a typed schema object; [] alone is invalid.

schema.table: Record<string, string | number | boolean | null>[] | Record<string, 'string' | 'integer' | 'float' | 'boolean' | 'date' | 'datetime'> (the latter creates an empty table)

config?.plugin?: string - registered plugin name, defaulting to the first available plugin; this entry loads Datagrid
config?.columns?: string[] - show all columns by default

spec.note: perspective-viewer needs an explicit pixel height to draw its plugin area. The default is 400px and AI may override it; do not use vh or percentage heights.

data_in.note: table 先交给 @finos/perspective worker.table,再把返回的 Table 交给 perspective-viewer.load;空态必须传带类型的 schema 对象,不能只传 []。

schema.table: Record<string, string | number | boolean | null>[] | Record<string, 'string' | 'integer' | 'float' | 'boolean' | 'date' | 'datetime'>（后者创建空表）

config?.plugin?: string —— 已注册插件名,默认第一个可用插件;本条加载 Datagrid

spec.note: perspective-viewer 需要显式像素高度才能绘制插件区域;默认 400px,AI 可覆盖,禁用 vh/百分比高。

example._why: worker 表类型与 viewer 深配置容易错配,minimal 固定 table→load→restore 所需字段。

uplink: 本条默认是本地数据探索;若需要把当前视图配置带回对话,由消费 AI 监听 Perspective 原生配置事件并按载体处理,不焊接统一事件协议。

carriers.widget: conditional:仅在宿主允许 WebAssembly、Worker 与 jsDelivr 跨源模块时可用;custom element 经 createElement 挂入 shadow
carriers.codex: conditional:需要 sandbox CSP 开放 WebAssembly + Worker;若任一被禁则不能降级为百万行本地透视

isolation.evidence: perspective-viewer@3.8.0 +esm (57KB) has no document.head or document.body references; it uses `new CSSStyleSheet` (adoptedStyleSheets) inside its own component shadow root plus customElements.define. No head/body footprint, but it requires WebAssembly + Web Worker + cross-origin ESM loading, so shadow use is gated on host capabilities; worker/event listeners not exhaustively traced and runtime not live-tested.
